name: AerioTV Pairing
description: Pairs AerioTV Fire TV clients with Dispatcharr and serves the AerioTV sync document. Click the pairing page link above to link Fire TV devices and manage paired devices.
author: AerioTV

fields.label: Server base URL
fields.help_text: Returned to AerioTV after pairing so the app knows how to reach Dispatcharr. Leave blank to use the address of this Dispatcharr server.

fields.label: API key override
fields.help_text: The Dispatcharr API key returned to AerioTV on approval. Leave blank — the plugin automatically uses the approving admin's key. Only set this if auto-detection fails.
